Buyer DashboardMarketplaceRequest Custom Dataset

For Consumers

Contribute your data on your terms.

Sovrn helps you stay in control of your data while participating in a privacy-safe marketplace. You decide what you share, see how it is used, and earn when consented contributions create value.

Create AccountView Consumer Dashboard

What you control

Data categories: Device & connectivity, mobility signals, consumer pulse surveys, and preference trends.

Privacy: Individual records are never sold directly. Buyers receive aggregated, consent-based insights.

Earnings: You earn when marketplace value is created, based on demand, quality, and participation.

How it works

  1. 1. Create an account.
  2. 2. Choose consent categories.
  3. 3. Sync eligible data and surveys.
  4. 4. Earn when aggregated insights are requested by buyers.

Consent categories

Device & Connectivity Data

Network context, signal quality, and device health signals used only in aggregated reports.

General Location / Mobility Signals

Aggregated movement and foot traffic patterns by ZIP code—not raw GPS trails.

Consumer Pulse Surveys

Opt-in survey signals used for market research and sentiment panels.

Future Financial Data

Not currently collected. Will require separate explicit consent when available.

Earnings and expectations

Earnings depend on buyer demand, data category, data quality, and marketplace participation. GetSovrn shows estimated value as data products become active, but cannot guarantee payouts until buyer access is approved.
